name: Security Care Trnsprtn Co
recent_news: No M&A or news found; Manta lists business as small/unclaimed with ~$252K revenue and ~4 employees.
fit_notes: Very small operator (~5 employees, ~$364K rev) in Manassas, VA. Appears to be a NEMT/disability transport micro-business, not a school-bus contractor. Limited tuck-in relevance for Summit unless adjacent SPED contract scope can be verified.

name: Comfort Coach Transportation
recent_news: No M&A; ~17 years in business, women-owned, family-run; CPR/first-aid certified drivers; ADA wheelchair vehicles.
fit_notes: Women-owned, family-run ADA/wheelchair transport micro-business in Oceanside, CA. Not a school-bus contractor; focused on disability/senior medical transport. Marginal tuck-in fit unless SPED routes for North County SD districts can be confirmed.

name: Withers Transportation
recent_news: No M&A or news found; LinkedIn entity 'Withers Transportation LLC' exists but limited detail; no district contracts confirmed.
fit_notes: Small Charlotte, NC operator (~5 employees, ~$361K rev). Appears NEMT/medical transport rather than school-bus contractor (CMS district uses CATS/in-house). Low tuck-in relevance for Summit.

name: New England Shuttle
recent_news: D&B lists company at 76 E Broadway, Salem NH; classified as Limousine Rental with Driver. Salem School District (SAU 57) uses Student Transportation of America (STA) as its yellow-bus contractor, not New England Shuttle.
fit_notes: Not a yellow school-bus operator; appears to be a livery/shuttle business with airport service. Low tuck-in fit for Summit's school-bus platform.

name: Alaska Handi-Transport
recent_news: No web presence located; not confirmed as an active operator. Anchorage School District SPED transport is largely run through ASD's own pupil transportation dept; alternative SPED provider in AK is EverDriven.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm Alaska Handi-Transport is an active, school-focused operator. Even if active, AK is outside Summit's contiguous-US tuck-in footprint and ASD self-operates most SPED transport. Very low tuck-in priority.
